name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkHeldBy(i, j) == forks[i] = j

PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Actions *)
TakeFork(i) == 
  /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<states, forks>>

PutFork(i) == 
  /\ ForkHeldBy(LEFT(i), i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<states, forks>>

Hungry(i) == 
  /\ PhilosopherThinking(i)
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, states>>

Eat(i) == 
  /\ PhilosopherHungry(i)
  /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
  /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, states>>

FinishEating(i) == 
  /\ PhilosopherEating(i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, states>>

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N : 
    (TakeFork(i) \/ PutFork(i) \/ Hungry(i) \/ Eat(i) \/ FinishEating(i))

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag



Init == 
  /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N : 
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ flag[i] := TRUE
    /\ num[i] := 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})
    /\ flag[i] := FALSE
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => 
        \E k \in 1..N : k # i /\ 
          (num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i))
    /\ num[i] := 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
       /\ head \in 1..K
       /\ tail \in 1..K
       /\ count \in 0..K
       /\ q = <<>>
       /\ head = 1
       /\ tail = 1
       /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
         /\ head \in 1..K
         /\ tail \in 1..K
         /\ count \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat : \E newVotedFor \in FiniteSet :
       /\ state = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = newVotedFor
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat : \E newVotedFor \in FiniteSet :
       /\ state = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = newVotedFor
       /\ state' = "Leader"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Leader"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree

---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, chosenValue, chosenBallot, chosenAcceptors, chosenValueSet, chosenBallotSet, chosenAcceptorsSet

Init == /\ acceptors = <<>>
       /\ proposers = <<>>
       /\ promises = <<>>
       /\ accepted = <<>>
       /\ chosen = <<>>
       /\ chosenValue = <<>>
       /\ chosenBallot = <<>>
       /\ chosenAcceptors = <<>>
       /\ chosenValueSet = <<>>
       /\ chosenBallotSet = <<>>
       /\ chosenAcceptorsSet = <<>>

Next == /\ acceptors' = acceptors
       /\ proposers' = proposers
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ accepted' = accepted
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ chosenValue' = chosenValue
       /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
       /\ chosenAcceptors' = chosenAcceptors
       /\ chosenValueSet' = chosenValueSet
       /\ chosenBallotSet' = chosenBallotSet
       /\ chosenAcceptorsSet' = chosenAcceptorsSet

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, chosenValue, chosenBallot, chosenAcceptors, chosenValueSet, chosenBallotSet, chosenAcceptorsSet>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE
VARIABLES chunk, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = FILE
    /\ chunk = 1
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ chunk <= Len(file)
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ chunk' = chunk + 1
       \/ /\ chunk' = chunk
          /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
          /\ chunk' <= Len(file)
    /\ receivedChunks' = IF chunk' <= Len(file) THEN Append(receivedChunks, chunk') ELSE receivedChunks

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunk, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

       /\ txWriteSetKeys = <<>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N:
              /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + \E j \in 1..N: (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) \div N]
              /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \E i \in 1..N:
              /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + \E j \in 1..N: (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) \div N]
              /\ epsilon' = epsilon + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
        /\ flag[2] = FALSE
        /\ flag[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn = 2
        /\ flag[2] = FALSE
        /\ flag[1] = FALSE
        /\ flag[2] = TRUE
        /\ turn = 1
        /\ flag[1] = FALSE
        /\ flag[2] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}
        /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = 0

Next == /\ turn' \in {0,1}
        /\ wants' \in {0,1}
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants
        /\ (turn = 0 /\ wants = 0 => /\ turn' = 1
                                   /\ wants' = 1)
        /\ (turn = 1 /\ wants = 1 => /\ turn' = 0
                                   /\ wants' = 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [k \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][k], counts[m][k])]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
